artPrompt: A grinning goblin wizard hunches over a battered snack cart wreathed in flame, juggling a sizzling pretzel in one hand and a small fireball in the other, the fireball foreshortened blazing toward the viewer, steam and sparks rising into night-black smoke. Hot coals glow beneath the cart, ember light rims his pointed hat and tusks, a bonfire flickers behind, manic culinary pyromania. Rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Snack Cart Pyromancer
text:
When Snack Cart Pyromancer enters the battlefield, create two Snack tokens. (A Snack is an artifact with "Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 1 life and feel a little better. Then draw a card if you control a Goblin.")
{R}, Sacrifice a Snack: Snack Cart Pyromancer deals 2 damage to any target.
flavorText: Hot pretzels, cold sodas, and exactly one fireball per customer.
